# Nintedanib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Nintedanib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Nintedanib</strong> 目前有 <strong>34 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nintedanib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vargatef is indicated in combination with docetaxel for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced, metastatic or locally recurrent non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) of adenocarcinoma...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.2%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（98.9%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（98.9%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（98.8%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（98.8%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（98.8%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（98.7%）</li>
<li>trichomegaly-retina pigmentary degeneration-dwarfism syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>familial rhabdoid tumor（98.5%）</li>
<li>lower motor neuron syndrome with late-adult onset（98.5%）</li>
<li>extracutaneous mastocytoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>monomelic amyotrophy（98.3%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant mitochondrial myopathy with exercise intolerance（98.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/nintedanib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
